title: Signature Private Cloud
description: Developed the Cloud UI for an enterprise private cloud platform managing foundational services. Worked on KMS, EIP, CLS, CAU, VPS, CBS, and IAM for secure access control. Built real-time Grafana monitoring dashboards.
metrics: Intuitive and scalable interfaces for efficient cloud resource management.

title: Milesum
description: Designed a multi-tenant business platform with modules for CRM, Operations, Accounting, and Task Management. Frontend handles state via Redux; backend leverages Laravel for business logic and Node.js for real-time analytics.
metrics: Dynamic, scalable real-time data processing and enterprise insights.

title: Fundever
description: A marketplace simplifying the land and commercial lending process for lenders, brokers, and borrowers. Managed complex application forms using Formik and Yup validation.
metrics: Digitized and streamlined a traditionally tedious lending process.

title: Carlton One
description: Portal for managing nominations and awards. Engineered core microservices for Nomination, Award, and app downloadable links, while integrating front-end modules.
metrics: Highly decoupled architecture serving multiple enterprise clients.

title: Trea360
description: Developed an ERP solution for landscaping and construction companies featuring heavy modules for Workflow management, dispatch management, and HRM.
metrics: Comprehensive business process automation for construction.

title: Ticketgateway
description: An online portal (ticketgateway.com) to buy and sell tickets and costumes online. Built custom logic allowing users to seamlessly create events and manage ticket inventory.
metrics: Robust event creation and marketplace engine.

title: MonaB
description: An online portal (ticketgateway.com) to buy and sell tickets and costumes online. Built custom logic allowing users to seamlessly create events and manage ticket inventory.
metrics: Robust event creation and marketplace engine.
